arts.ttl: “Interesting profile” – Intermediary speaks of club’s liking for Everton man, expects him to settle well
arts.sum: Dominic Calvert-Lewin’s current contract at Everton runs out in the summer of 2025. The Englishman has been a regular for the Toffees this season under Sean Dyche, playing 16 Premier League games. But he has scored only two goals and there has been no movement regarding a new deal for the striker. arts.ttl: Footballers at Christmas! Stars enjoy festivities alongside WAGs and their children as likes of Cristiano Ronaldo and Bernardo Silva pose in calm before the storm ahead of Boxing Day fixtures
arts.sum: Players have been settling down to enjoy the day, though many will be in training too ahead of a chaotic period post-Christmas with a number of games taking place all over the world.

arts.ttl: Roma’s Christmas wishlist: Raspadori or Beto, and Ranieri’s hunt for a new manager
arts.sum: As the festive season approaches, Roma's Trigoria training ground is buzzing with renewed optimism under Claudio Ranieri's leadership. The recent victory against Parma has provided some much-needed relief after a challenging start to the season. However, Ranieri is already looking ahead, with transfer market reinforcements and a search for his successor topping his Christmas list.
